items.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch coordinated attacks across Mali
items.summary: Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north of the country in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

items.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
items.summary: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.

items.title: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
items.summary: Local elections are held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 白堊紀大海怪！長達19公尺、遠古巨型章魚有「利齒」
items.summary: 恐龍稱霸陸地的白堊紀年代，海洋中的頂級掠食者可能不只有鯊魚、滄龍和蛇頸龍。根據一份23日發表的研究，一種體型如北歐傳說中的大海怪「克拉肯」（Kraken）般巨大的章魚，生活在白...…

items.title: 遺體下落不明！日男涉殺妻棄屍焚化爐  旭山動物園恐延後開園
items.summary: 日本北海道熱門景點旭山動物園發生棄屍疑雲，一位在該園工作的30多歲男子涉嫌將妻子遺體棄置在動物園焚化爐，目前正接受警方調查。據了解，該名男子僅供稱「將妻子焚燒了數個小時」。  ...…

items.title: 中國將流浪乞討人員改為「流散人員」 中網引發群嘲
items.summary: 中國全國人大常委會官員昨天說，「社會救助法」草案將「流浪乞討人員」的表述修改為「流散人員」，理由是流浪乞討人員數量明顯減少，現在多為「暫時遇困人員」。消息一出，在中國社群引發群嘲；許多網友譏...…
